name: player yards created and blocked + team yards blocked
description: Test case for player yards created and blocked + team yards blocked
expected_query: with "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, SUM(yards_created) as yards_created_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)), "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, SUM(yards_blocked) as yards_blocked_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by COALESCE(bc_pid)), "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" as (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(yards_blocked) AS team_yards_blocked_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" as (select "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team", sum(t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279.team_yards_blocked_from_plays) as team_yards_blocked_from_plays from "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" group by "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c"."yards_created_from_plays" AS "yards_created_from_plays_0", "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."yards_blocked_from_plays" AS "yards_blocked_from_plays_0", "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_yards_blocked_from_plays" AS "team_yards_blocked_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c" on "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec" on "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" on "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" group by "t5942eca62be402b50af32fb6a557197c"."yards_created_from_plays", "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."yards_blocked_from_plays", "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_yards_blocked_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
